title: koenigia nummulariifolia
intro: Koenigia nummulariifolia, also known as the coin-leaved buckwheat, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Polygonaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Koenigia nummulariifolia include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
